# C4 Reverse-Engineer Skill

Claude Code skill that reverse-engineers C4 architecture diagrams and behavioral specifications from codebases.

## Project Structure

```
SKILL.md              # Skill definition (frontmatter + workflow)
references/           # Reference docs loaded during specific phases
  subagent-prompts.md       # 7 subagent instructions + framework calibration
  verification-templates.md # 8 verification templates for Phase 3
  review-format.md          # Review output format for Phase 6
  failure-modes.md          # 9 known failure modes
  example-output.md         # Toy project example for phrasing calibration
scripts/              # Deterministic helper scripts
  count_source_lines.py          # Phase 1 tier sizing
  find_external_calls.py         # Phase 3 external call inventory
  find_platform_conditionals.py  # Phase 3 platform conditional inventory
```

## Development

- Scripts are standalone Python 3 with no dependencies beyond the standard library
- Scripts have shebang lines and should be invoked directly, not via `python`
- All scripts exclude test files and vendored code by default
- SKILL.md targets < 500 lines; detailed content goes in `references/`

## Testing

Run scripts against any project root to verify output:

```bash
./scripts/count_source_lines.py /path/to/project
./scripts/find_external_calls.py /path/to/project --group
./scripts/find_platform_conditionals.py /path/to/project
```
